metadata.description: CO-RAR — Continuous Resilient Adversarial Reasoning in Codeless Design

plugins.name: co-rar
plugins.description: Design and critique frame for systems where AI orchestrates execution and quality is held by a continuous adversarial loop — anti-spam/anti-fraud, warmup and deliverability, agentic pipelines, codeless backends, systems that must mutate under environmental pressure instead of decaying.
